text_block_list.text: This... is Tracen Academy.

Here, promising young Umamusume
gather to train as racers, their hearts filled
with dreams of glory found in the Twinkle
Series...

Together with their schoolmates, they
spend their days training both body and
mind...

And yet... not all are content with the
current state of the academy.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: EMERGENCY!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: THIS CANNOT GO OOON!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's the matter, Director?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna! I, the Tracen Academy director,
love my students more than anything...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I cannot stand to see even a
single racer's potential squandered! And
yet, that is exaaactly what is happening!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Which is why...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Proposal! I shall create a completely new
racing event!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What?! A new event?! From scratch?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative! Our students will now have
another set of races to look forward to
beyond the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
One that includes all distances! All
courses! A racing event unlike any that
have come before!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: I shall call it...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: The URA Finale!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: URA... Finale...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Prepare yourself! We're about to get very
busy!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Quickly! We must schedule a press
meeting. The world must know of this
news!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Director...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Understood. Leave it to me!

And thus begins the story of a new racing
event, the URA Finale.

Created to help all Umamusume shine,
this race...

Shall be the stage upon which you and
your trainee's story unfolds!
The Beginning! URA Finale!
